Agentic Evidence is useful because the proof surface is public.

The live product gives reviewers a way to inspect candidate AI-evidence packets instead of relying on a resume claim. The current surface includes reviewer handoff, repo-packaged Claude JSONL exports, assignment packets, guided VM flow, OpenAPI, health, and a $199/month price point.

Next useful move: hidden-test grading.
